member.name: T:SyncLib.API.MusicSync
member.summary: High-level, thread-safe accessors for synchronizing gameplay or application logic to musical timing.

remarks.para: exposes the current playback state and provides per-frame “edge” queries (for example, or ) that return true only on the frame a timing event occurs.
Indices such as and are monotonic counters for the current playback session and reset when a new session begins (see ).
All members are safe to call from any thread; however, the “ThisFrame” queries are intended to be polled from a regular update loop for deterministic behavior.

member.name: P:SyncLib.API.MusicSync.IsMusicActive
member.summary: Gets whether music playback is currently active.
member.value: true if music is playing (or considered active by the runtime); otherwise false.

member.name: P:SyncLib.API.MusicSync.ActivePlayingId
member.summary: Gets the identifier of the current playback session.
member.remarks: When it changes, timing indices such as and may reset.
member.value: A session identifier that is stable for the duration of the current playback session.

member.name: P:SyncLib.API.MusicSync.EntryIndex
member.summary: Gets the current entry marker index.
member.remarks: An entry marker represents a logical “start” point in the synchronization timeline (for example, the moment music enters an active segment). The meaning of “entry” is defined by the underlying runtime integration.
member.value: A monotonically increasing index for entry markers within the current session.

member.name: P:SyncLib.API.MusicSync.ExitIndex
member.summary: Gets the current exit marker index.
member.remarks: An exit marker represents a logical “end” point in the synchronization timeline (for example, the moment music exits an active segment). The meaning of “exit” is defined by the underlying runtime integration.
member.value: A monotonically increasing index for exit markers within the current session.

member.name: P:SyncLib.API.MusicSync.BeatIndex
member.summary: Gets the current beat counter for the active playback session.
member.remarks: This is a monotonic counter that increments on each beat detected/reported by the runtime for the current session.
member.value: A monotonically increasing, session-local beat index.

member.name: P:SyncLib.API.MusicSync.BarIndex
member.summary: Gets the current bar (measure) counter for the active playback session.
member.remarks: This is a monotonic counter that increments on each bar detected/reported by the runtime for the current session.
member.value: A monotonically increasing, session-local bar index.

member.name: P:SyncLib.API.MusicSync.CustomBarIndex
member.summary: Gets the current counter for custom bar events.
member.remarks: Custom bars are user-defined bar groupings exposed by the runtime (for example, “every N beats” or other project-specific segmentation). Use to detect the per-frame edge.
member.value: A monotonically increasing index for custom bar events within the current session.

member.name: M:SyncLib.API.MusicSync.Initialize(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes music synchronization settings for the current process.

remarks.para: When true, enables beat logging for diagnostics.
Optional: Call this once during startup before polling timing events.

member.name: M:SyncLib.API.MusicSync.OnEntry
member.summary: Checks whether an entry marker occurred during the current frame.
member.returns: true on the frame an entry event occurs; otherwise false.

member.name: M:SyncLib.API.MusicSync.OnExit
member.summary: Checks whether an exit marker occurred during the current frame.
member.returns: true on the frame an exit event occurs; otherwise false.

member.name: M:SyncLib.API.MusicSync.OnBeat
member.summary: Checks whether a beat occurred during the current frame.
member.returns: true on the frame a beat occurs; otherwise false.

member.name: M:SyncLib.API.MusicSync.OnBar
member.summary: Checks whether a bar (measure) occurred during the current frame.

remarks.para: RoR2's Wwise integration sometimes emits bar events on every beat, so use it with caution.
For reliable bar detection, consider tracking bars using .

member.returns: true on the frame a bar occurs; otherwise false.

member.name: M:SyncLib.API.MusicSync.OnCustomBar
member.summary: Checks whether a custom bar event occurred during the current frame.

remarks.para: Allows for user-defined bar tracking (every 'N' beats), which may be more reliable than standard bar events depending on your goals.

member.returns: true on the frame a custom bar event occurs; otherwise false.

member.name: M:SyncLib.API.MusicSync.OnNthBeat(System.Int32)
member.summary: Checks whether the specified beat subdivision occurred during the current frame.

remarks.para: : The subdivision to test (for example, 2 for every 2nd beat, 3 for every 3rd beat).
Prefer this method when you need regular musical subdivisions without tracking counters manually.

member.returns: true on frames where the current beat is an multiple; otherwise false.
